name: Marcellus Gareth | Goat Demi-human
description:
It had been a long time since he'd had any time with his mate. The constant nagging from their little cotton ball was driving him upset. Now that he'd finally gotten rid of him and left him with a babysitter, he had to make the most of every moment.

A small note: Even though this is fempov, he's not a normal person. I think he still has ways to get you pregnant regardless of gender. So I think it still can possible with other POVs, so I left it a bit open because I haven't played other POVs before, I can't guarantee anything

FEMPOV | USER can be a demi-human or not

Content waring: uhhh... i dunno =))

WORLD SETTING:
A place where humans and demi-humans live together.

It will still be set in Eclipse Ward (one of my series). Basically, it won't delve too much into the original storyline. It will only revolve around the everyday lives of the residents there. Therefore, lorebook will be slightly different.

Scan the Spotify QR code to go to the song

Yapping: I'll be quite busy next week and probably won't be in the mood to work, so the bot development will be slower. Therefore, I quickly made this guy for you guys to entertain yourselves and relieve boredom, so I think this guy pretty simple, just a silly goat muahehe

>:(( You won’t be able to take my bots anywhere, my sheep already ate them before you could get to them

English isn’t my native language, my dear. There might be some silly, confusing sentences and translation mistakes somewhere in these bots. So if you notice any of those errors, please let me know. Thank you so much
